name: Relax Fix UAE - Lead Preview Internal Alert

parameters.jsCode:
return items.map((item) => ({
  json: {
    event_type: 'internal_new_lead_preview',
    severity: 'info',
    route_to: 'staff-preview-queue',
    alert_recipient: 'relaxfix2026@gmail.com',
    lead_reference: item.json.lead_id,
    booking_reference: item.json.booking_reference,
    source: item.json.source,
    language: item.json.language,
    service: item.json.service,
    location_id: item.json.location_id,
    requested_date: item.json.requested_date,
    requested_time: item.json.requested_time,
    idempotency_key: item.json.idempotency_key,
    retry_policy: 'maximum-2-after-idempotency-check',
    calendar_conflict_check_required: true,
    appointment_confirmed: false,
    preview_only: true,
    outbound_message_sent: false,
    external_write_performed: false
  }
}));
